retrieved_result: What Can Numbness in the Upper Right Thigh Indicate? Full Answer Meralgia paresthetica results from wearing tight clothes, gaining weight, being obese or becoming pregnant, states Mayo Clinic. It may also occur due to a disease or a local trauma.
